2126100.name: X-Plane 12 Global Scenery: North America
2126100.description:
X-Plane 12 Global Scenery: North America is a free DLC that you can activate through your Steam Client. It will give you the default North America Scenery.

X-Plane 12, built by pilots and engineers – for everyone.


New Engine Features in X-Plane 12
  • Volumetric 3D Clouds
  • Physics-Based Photometric Lighting Model
  • Worldwide 3D Water
  • Rewritten AI Air Traffic Control System
  • Global 3D Forests
  • Seasonal Textures and Weather Effects
  • Revamped Real Weather Data

New Aircraft in X-Plane 12
  • Airbus A330
  • Cessna Citation X
  • Lancair Evolution
  • Cirrus SR22
  • Piper PA-18 Super Cub
  • Van's RV-10
  • Robinson R22 (plus a floats version)
2126100.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 日语, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙, 俄语, 繁体中文
*具有完全音频支持的语言
